tools.name: certify_call
tools.description: Call an external API and get a cryptographic proof of the transaction. Use instead of calling the API directly when you need an auditable, tamper-evident record.

tools.name: get_proof
tools.description: Retrieve the full cryptographic proof bundle for a given proof ID.

tools.name: verify_proof
tools.description: Get a human-readable summary of what a proof certifies — useful for auditors.

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Check your ArkForge API usage and remaining credits for the current period.

ARKFORGE_API_KEY.description: Your ArkForge API key. Get a free key (500 proofs/month) at arkforge.tech.
